## Summary

Describe the purpose and scope of this pull request.

## Validation

- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] `go build ./...`
- [ ] `go vet ./...`

## Checklist

- [ ] Public API changes are documented
- [ ] README/examples updated when behavior changed
- [ ] Integration tests updated if required
- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`)
